category_title: Students with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) exhibiting varying levels of engagement and interaction
scenario_title: Whole-class participation in core subjects without individual support
minimal_context: The student is expected to participate in a whole-class math lesson by answering a problem on the board.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Class, we are going over the math worksheet together. Alex, please tell the class your answer for question number three.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stares at the wall and does not look at the worksheet or respond.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think the answer is?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts tearing the corners of the worksheet and looking away from the board.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to follow along with the rest of us.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the worksheet off the desk and turns the chair away from the front of the room, refusing to participate in the whole-class activity.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Class, we are going over the math worksheet together. Alex, please tell the class your answer for question number three.

STUDENT: (Stares at the wall and does not look at the worksheet or respond.)

TUTOR: What do you think the answer is?

STUDENT: (Starts tearing the corners of the worksheet and looking away from the board.)

TUTOR: Keep trying to follow along with the rest of us.

STUDENT: (Pushes the worksheet off the desk and turns the chair away from the front of the room, refusing to participate in the whole-class activity.)

task.content: Participation within the entire class during one of the core subjects (e.g., literacy or maths)

context.environment: Mainstream classroom in a non-co-taught setting
context.social_setting: Entire class setting without the presence of a Special Education Teacher (SET)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When expected to participate within the entire class in non-co-taught classes without extra help
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Observed to be inattentive/misbehave more often and does not participate

behavior_patterns.condition: When working in non-co-taught classes without individual teaching
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Lower levels of being 'on task' and 'actively participates'
